name: Habit Architect
description: Build tiny, repeatable habit systems from user goals, routines, friction points, and recovery needs.

name: Life OS Planner
description: Convert roles, responsibilities, values, and goals into a weekly personal operating system.
inspired_by: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People

name: Human Message Rewriter
description: Rewrite difficult messages so they are clear, warm, respectful, and more likely to get a useful response.
inspired_by: How to Win Friends and Influence People

name: Focus Block Designer
description: Design realistic deep-work schedules around energy, distractions, deadlines, and shallow-work batching.

name: Chaos-to-Action Processor
description: Turn brain dumps, messy notes, or emails into next actions, projects, waiting items, and scheduled work.

name: Automation Opportunity Finder
description: Audit recurring work and identify what to eliminate, delegate, automate, or systemize.

name: SOP Builder
description: Turn repeated business processes into clear SOPs, checklists, roles, and quality controls.

name: MVP Experiment Designer
description: Design lean validation experiments for startup ideas before users overbuild.

name: Startup Advantage Analyzer
description: Evaluate whether a startup idea has a real strategic edge or is just another product.

name: Business Health Diagnostic
description: Diagnose whether a business is blocked by strategy, focus, people, execution, or market issues.

name: Decision Bias Auditor
description: Audit important decisions for cognitive bias, emotional reasoning, missing evidence, and poor framing.

name: Persuasion Quality Auditor
description: Improve landing pages, offers, posts, and sales messages using ethical persuasion and clear proof.

name: Offer Context Designer
description: Design the context, opening, and pre-frame that makes an offer easier to understand and accept.

name: Message Stickiness Enhancer
description: Turn vague ideas into simple, concrete, emotional, memorable messages.

name: Shareability Scorer
description: Score and improve posts, reels, captions, and articles for practical value, emotional pull, and shareability.

name: Negotiation Reply Coach
description: Create calm, strategic, ethical replies for salary, client, vendor, and partnership negotiations.

name: B2B Insight Seller
description: Create B2B sales messages that teach buyers a useful insight instead of listing services.

name: Discovery Question Generator
description: Generate sales discovery questions and call flows that uncover context, pain, consequences, and value.

name: Category Positioning Coach
description: Clarify a product or service category, alternative, differentiation, tagline, and homepage positioning.

name: Beachhead Market Finder
description: Choose the best initial niche by scoring urgency, ability to pay, access, and reference value.

name: Differentiation Map Builder
description: Find a stronger market angle by identifying what to remove, reduce, raise, and create.

name: Customer Discovery Interviewer
description: Create neutral, evidence-based customer interview scripts that avoid false validation.

name: Retention Loop Designer
description: Design ethical product retention loops around triggers, actions, rewards, investment, and re-engagement.

name: Usability Problem Finder
description: Review product screens, flows, or descriptions for affordance, feedback, errors, and mental-model mismatches.

name: Website Clarity Auditor
description: Audit a website or landing page for first-impression clarity, navigation, trust, CTA, and conversion friction.

name: Money Behavior Coach
description: Help users think clearly about financial choices by separating math, emotion, risk, and time horizon.

name: Asset vs Expense Coach
description: Classify purchases or investments as asset, liability, expense, or strategic investment and show cash-flow impact.

name: Feedback Reframer
description: Turn criticism, rejection, or performance feedback into useful learning signals and improvement actions.

name: Long-Term Goal Coach
description: Convert long-term ambitions into skill milestones, deliberate practice, tracking, and resilience plans.

name: Resistance Breaker
description: Diagnose procrastination, perfectionism, avoidance, and fear; create a 10-minute starting action.
